name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
Two-tone enamel buckle in stock!!️
Classic Lady Duchess bag, iconic letter charm, classic quilted pattern, excellent quality sheepskin, a must-have 3-compartment small bag😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, crossbody or handheld, very feminine, classic and stylish. A beauty that many fashion icons and on Instagram have, don't miss it❤️
size:17*7*15cm
